V-M-010.checks: Admin frontend builds and reflects current admin, Full Tunnel, system, analytics, and device-control surfaces without auth regression.
V-M-010.test-files: frontend-admin/index.html frontend-admin/public/favicon.ico frontend-admin/public/favicon-16x16.png frontend-admin/public/favicon-32x32.png frontend-admin/public/apple-touch-icon.png frontend-admin/src/main.tsx frontend-admin/src/components/MatrixBackground.tsx frontend-admin/src/components/VisualShell.tsx frontend-admin/src/components/Layout.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Login.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Users.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Devices.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/MTProto.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/MTProtoAnalytics.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Analytics.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Servers.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Plans.tsx frontend-admin/src/lib/api.ts frontend-admin/src/stores/auth.ts frontend-admin/src/types/index.ts frontend-admin/src/index.css scripts/phase51-brand-assets-smoke.mjs scripts/phase52-matrix-visual-smoke.mjs scripts/phase54-admin-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs scripts/phase59-motion-interactions-smoke.mjs scripts/phase74-admin-shell-navigation-smoke.mjs scripts/phase75-admin-users-devices-smoke.mjs
V-M-010.commands: pass-local 2026-06-05: frontend-admin build and Phase-75 admin Users/Devices smoke passed for unified Users inventory, no visible Devices nav, safe /devices redirect, expanded device rows, confirmation guards, and protected backend/deploy/runtime/user frontend guard.

levels.module-local: Run npm build after frontend-admin route, component, API binding, or type changes.
levels.wave-level: During Phase-24, pair the build with V-M-037 mobile smoke for /, /users, /devices, and /analytics.
levels.phase-level: Frontend-admin remains pass only if auth guard, route registration, and admin API bindings compile after compact UI changes.

module-checks.check-2: Layout, Dashboard, Users, Devices, Analytics, Servers, and Plans compile against current types.
module-checks.check-3: adminApi base path remains /api/v1 unless a separate backend/API migration is approved.
module-checks.check-4: Device API binding names remain getDevices, blockDevice, unblockDevice, rotateDevice, and revokeDevice.
module-checks.check-5: Phase-24 does not change auth/session storage behavior; M-039 owns that in Phase-25.
module-checks.check-6: Admin auth store clears admin_refresh_token whenever admin_token is cleared.
module-checks.check-7: Admin login email/password fields do not expose stale default credential placeholders.
module-checks.check-8: Admin inputs with left icons use shared icon padding so the icon and placeholder/value text cannot overlap.
module-checks.check-9: Admin index.html references real favicon.ico and PNG fallbacks from frontend-admin public assets.
module-checks.check-10: No visible admin layout logo is added before the planned frontend redesign phase.
module-checks.check-11: Admin main mounts VisualShell around the existing route tree without changing auth state, API clients, or route registration.
module-checks.check-12: Admin index.css exposes Matrix tokens, pointer-safe visual layers, focus-visible rules, and reduced-motion policy.
module-checks.check-13: Phase-74 intentionally supersedes the Phase-54 visible /plans route requirement: /plans is registered only as a safe redirect to / and must not show a visible admin Tariffs page.
module-checks.check-14: Phase-54 admin UI changes preserve adminApi base path, endpoint names, auth store behavior, and React Query mutation boundaries.
module-checks.check-15: Phase-54 smoke confirms compact Matrix surfaces do not create document-level horizontal overflow or icon/text/control overlap on mobile.
module-checks.check-16: Phase-54 protected-surface guard confirms install.sh, deploy, nginx, docker-compose, docker-compose.yml, and runtime topology stay unchanged.
module-checks.check-17: Phase-59 motion smoke confirms admin feedback/status transitions, reduced-motion fallback, pointer-scroll/focus safety, and protected backend/deploy/runtime isolation.
module-checks.check-18: Admin /login is minimal: large unframed logo, email/password inputs, error state, submit action, no route-card strip, no helper paragraphs, and no default credential hints.
module-checks.check-19: Phase-74 intentionally supersedes the old visible admin /plans navigation requirement: "Тарифы" must be removed from admin UI only.
module-checks.check-20: Phase-74 admin login inputs must keep icon-safe padding for placeholder and typed values in email/password fields.
module-checks.check-21: Phase-74 admin logout must render directly under "Ноды" while preserving existing token cleanup and auth role gates.
module-checks.check-22: Phase-74 admin main content must scroll normally under mouse wheel when the cursor is over content, not only over the rail.
module-checks.check-23: Phase-74 admin rail must be bounded/clipped to the same visible height budget as the main admin content surface.
module-checks.check-24: Phase-74 direct /plans handling must be safe without leaving a visible stale Tariffs card or broken route.
module-checks.check-25: Phase-75 must expose a single visible admin "Пользователи" inventory that includes expandable per-user devices.
module-checks.check-26: Phase-75 must remove the separate visible "Устройства" admin navigation entry after those actions are reachable inside /users.
module-checks.check-27: Phase-75 direct /devices handling must be safe redirect or compatibility route, never a stale duplicate primary inventory.
module-checks.check-28: Phase-75 Users page must load or group device rows by user_id, show loading/empty/error states, and keep the list bounded for many devices.
module-checks.check-29: Phase-75 device action controls must preserve adminApi blockDevice, unblockDevice, rotateDevice, and revokeDevice mutation boundaries.
module-checks.check-30: Phase-75 smoke must prove frontend-admin build, unified route/navigation markers, expandable device rows, action confirmations, and protected backend/deploy/runtime/user frontend guard.

phase-54-admin-route-gates.gate-1: Login uses Matrix shell, empty email/password fields, icon padding safety, visible focus states, and no stale default credential hints.
phase-54-admin-route-gates.gate-2: Protected layout exposes compact navigation to dashboard, users, devices, MTProto, servers, plans, and analytics without horizontal scroll.
phase-54-admin-route-gates.gate-3: Dashboard, users, devices, servers, plans, analytics, and MTProto pages compile against current types and remain operational rather than marketing-like.
phase-54-admin-route-gates.gate-4: Admin destructive actions remain confirmation-safe and keyboard reachable after visual redesign.
phase-54-admin-route-gates.gate-5: Evidence must include static route smoke for protected admin routes when no authenticated local backend session is available.

phase-74-admin-shell-gates.gate-1: cd frontend-admin && npm run build passed after route/nav/layout/login changes.
phase-74-admin-shell-gates.gate-2: node scripts/phase74-admin-shell-navigation-smoke.mjs passed for icon-safe admin login fields, no visible "Тарифы" nav, safe /plans handling, logout directly under "Ноды", content scroll markers, and rail bounds.
phase-74-admin-shell-gates.gate-3: Phase-54/58/59/61/62 regressions remain required final-run gates so admin route compaction, motion, responsiveness, and deletion-audit contracts stay valid after the controlled Tariffs removal.
phase-74-admin-shell-gates.gate-4: Protected guard in Phase-74 smoke proved backend billing, user-facing tariff cards, deploy/install, nginx, docker-compose, VPN runtime, and MTProto runtime are unchanged.

phase-75-admin-unified-inventory-gates.gate-1: cd frontend-admin && npm run build is mandatory after Users/Layout/main/api/type changes.
phase-75-admin-unified-inventory-gates.gate-2: node scripts/phase75-admin-users-devices-smoke.mjs must assert one visible Users inventory, no visible Devices nav, safe /devices redirect/compat handling, expandable user rows, and bounded device lists.
phase-75-admin-unified-inventory-gates.gate-3: The smoke must assert that block/unblock/rotate/revoke are still reachable through expanded user device rows and that no mutation runs before confirmation.
phase-75-admin-unified-inventory-gates.gate-4: Phase-54, Phase-58, Phase-59, Phase-61, Phase-62, and Phase-74 regressions remain final-run gates after the merge.
phase-75-admin-unified-inventory-gates.gate-5: Protected guard must prove deploy/install/nginx/docker-compose/VPN runtime/MTProto runtime/user frontend surfaces are unchanged; backend admin changes are allowed only for an approved minimal read-only device endpoint.

scenarios.scenario-1: Admin login route and protected layout still build after compact UI changes.
scenarios.scenario-2: Dashboard, users, devices, servers, plans, and analytics routes compile against existing admin API bindings.
scenarios.scenario-3: A frontend-admin UI simplification changes auth, admin API base path, or backend endpoint shape without approval.
scenarios.scenario-4: A compact navigation change drops /devices, /users, or /analytics from the registered protected route surface.
scenarios.scenario-5: Phase-54 visual changes hide MTProto, Plans, Users, Devices, or Servers workflows behind decorative Matrix effects.

observability.telemetry-1: Build evidence records command, exit code, and failing TypeScript/Vite output if any.
observability.telemetry-2: Do not record real admin tokens, refresh tokens, Authorization headers, or cookies in frontend-admin evidence.

evidence.evidence-1: 2026-05-10: cd frontend-admin && npm run build passed after Phase-24 compact admin UI changes.
evidence.evidence-2: 2026-05-10: Route/API binding static guard confirmed /users, /devices, /analytics, /api/v1, and existing device endpoint names.
evidence.evidence-3: 2026-05-10: Phase-25 admin refresh compatibility fix added; rebuild required by V-M-039/V-M-010.
evidence.evidence-4: 2026-05-10: cd frontend-admin && npm run build passed after admin refresh-token persistence cleanup.
evidence.evidence-5: 2026-05-21: Local admin UI fix removed login placeholders, removed stale admin@krotpn.com fallback copy, and passed frontend-admin build.
evidence.evidence-6: 2026-06-02: Phase-51 frontend-admin build passed and brand asset smoke --expect-dist confirmed admin favicon assets in dist.
evidence.evidence-7: 2026-06-03: Phase-52 frontend-admin build, Matrix visual smoke, and Chrome screenshots for admin /login at 360x740, 390x844, 430x932, 1440x900, plus reduced-motion 390x844 passed.
evidence.evidence-8: 2026-06-03: Phase-54 verification design added admin route, build, viewport, redaction, confirmation, and protected-surface gates before execution.
evidence.evidence-9: 2026-06-03: Phase-54 local execution passed frontend-admin build and scripts/phase54-admin-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs; route registration, compact Matrix primitives, bounded lists, MTProto redaction, canonical Plans readonly guard, reduced-motion markers, and protected deploy/install guard passed.
evidence.evidence-10: 2026-06-04: Phase-59 frontend-admin build, scripts/phase59-motion-interactions-smoke.mjs, and post-commit scripts/phase58-premium-admin-cockpit-smoke.mjs passed; admin feedback/status motion markers are present and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard passed.
evidence.evidence-11: 2026-06-04: Admin login follow-up removes the Phase-54 hero strip and helper copy, keeps only visible logo, inputs, error state, and Войти action, and updates Phase-54 smoke to lock that minimal surface.
evidence.evidence-12: 2026-06-05: Phase-74 frontend-admin build and admin shell smoke passed; Login has Phase-74 icon-safe fields, Layout has no visible Tariffs nav, main redirects /plans to /, Logout is under Nodes, and admin content/rail scroll markers are present.
evidence.evidence-13: 2026-06-05: Phase-75 frontend-admin build and scripts/phase75-admin-users-devices-smoke.mjs passed; Users groups AdminDevice rows by user_id, Layout removes visible Devices nav, main redirects /devices to /users, and confirmation-safe device actions stay inside expanded user rows.
